creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
<http://www.e2guardian.org/> and related sites are not entirely consistent with each other, however there seems to be a preference for uppercase E, lowercase g: 

    E2guardian

I'll draft a patch file for this, and for other minor issues in the description <https://www.freshports.org/www/e2guardian/#description> and in the package message.
